Her boyfriend is a pianist. He explained to us regarding a piece by Schubert "This passage should be played lyrically rather than rhythmically, otherwise it's a bit cheap." Susanna asked me to get her some Ravel scores as I can get them on the cheap from a friend of mine. We watched a boxing match in which Chris hit Joe with a cheap shot after he lost to Joe.
